name: Red & Black Raspberry Pudding Cake
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Frozen red raspberries in syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw and drain the frozen red raspberries well, reserving about one-third of the syrup.
2. Pick over the fresh berries for any stems or debris.
3. In a heavy saucepan, combine the sugar and cornstarch, add the reserved syrup and lemon juice, and mix well.
4. Add the thawed fruit and fresh black raspberries to the saucepan; bring to a boil over moderate heat while stirring constantly.
5. Simmer for 5 minutes until thickened.
6. In a large bowl, cream the butter.
7. Gradually add the sugar, beating until light and fluffy.
8. Add the egg and vanilla extract, then beat until smooth.
9. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt into another bowl.
10. Alternately add the flour mixture and milk to the butter mixture in small batches; beat well after each addition until fully blended.
11. Pour the batter evenly into a lightly greased 9-inch square baking pan.
12. Spoon the berry mixture over the top of the batter.
13. Bake in the center of a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 20 minutes.
14. Reduce the temperature to 325°F (165°C) and bake for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean.
15. Allow to cool on a wire rack for about 10 minutes before serving with cream or whipped cream.
